hadith_entries.text:
271. Narrated Sa'ad ibn Abu-Waqqas : 'I heard Allah's
Messenger saying: "Allah loves the pious rich man who is
inconspicuous." (Muslim)

272. Narrated Abu-Sa'eed Al-Khudri : "Allah's
Messenger said: "A time will come when the best property
of a Muslim will be sheep, which he will take on the top of
the mountains and to the places of rainfall (valleys), so as to
flee with his religion from the trials." (Bukhari)
*
